title: T-Mobile 5G Home Internet Promo Offers $200 Gift Card and Free Month

blocks.content: If you purchase an independently reviewed product or service through a link on our website, The Hollywood Reporter may receive an affiliate commission.

While there’s been plenty of buzz around T-Mobile, a new home internet offer has now entered the mix. For a limited time, the carrier is enticing shoppers to switch to T-Mobile 5G Home Internet with up to $200 back via virtual prepaid card, on top of a month of 5G home internet on them.1

Here’s how it works. Customers who switch from their current internet service provider to T-Mobile 5G Home Internet will receive their first month on them and up to $200 back based on their selected plan.1 T-Mobile’s 5G Home Internet offerings — and their corresponding gift card values — are as follows:

In addition to this limited-time promotion, T-Mobile is prioritizing ease for customers when switching providers, offering to pay off any incurred early termination fees up to $750 via virtual prepaid card.3 Plus, with its five-year price guarantee, customers who sign up now will have their 5G internet rate guaranteed for five years.4 There are also no monthly equipment fees or annual contracts.
Related: T-Mobile Deepens Its Promise of Fastest 5G Internet With Same-Day Delivery, Powered by DoorDash
1. Month on Us: with bill credit; plus tax. Money Back: via virtual prepaid card. Allow seven weeks from rebate submission.
4. Exclusions like taxes and fees apply.
